assertions.title: List with pagination returns correct pages

frictions.description: ExUnit location filtering with --trace prints many excluded tests before the targeted passing test, which adds noise to evidence logs.
frictions.resolution: Used line-targeted test commands and referenced only the relevant passing test lines and summary in report snippets.

summary: Tested 5 assigned CRUD assertions on terminal surface; all 5 passed with targeted ExUnit evidence logs.
